entity.label: Eliab
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: A Reubenite, son of Pallu (Num. 16:1, 12; 26:8, 9; Deut. 11:6).

nodes.label: Eliab
nodes.description: A Reubenite, son of Pallu (Num. 16:1, 12; 26:8, 9; Deut. 11:6).

nodes.label: Pallu
nodes.description: Separated, the second son of Reuben (1 Chr. 5:3); called Phallu, Gen. 46:9. He was the father of the Phalluites (Ex. 6:14; Num. 26:5, 8).

nodes.label: Nemuel
nodes.description: A Reubenite, a son of Eliab, and brother of Dathan and Abiram (Num. 26:9).

nodes.label: Abiram (son of Eliab)
nodes.description: One of the sons of Eliab, who joined Korah in the conspiracy against Moses and Aaron. He and all the conspirators, with their families and possessions (except the children of Korah), were swallowed up by an earthquake (Num. 16:1-27; 26:9; Ps. 106:17).

nodes.label: Dathan
nodes.description: Welled; belonging to a fountain, a son of Eliab, a Reubenite, who joined Korah (q.v.) in his conspiracy, and with his accomplices was swallowed up by an earthquake (Num. 16:1; 26:9; Deut. 11:6; Ps. 106:17).

verses.text: Now Korah, the son of Izhar, the son of Kohath, the son of Levi, and Dathan and Abiram, the sons of Eliab, and On, the son of Peleth, sons of Reuben, took men:
And Moses sent to call Dathan and Abiram, the sons of Eliab: which said, We will not come up:
And the sons of Pallu; Eliab.

And the sons of Eliab; Nemuel, and Dathan, and Abiram. This is that Dathan and Abiram, which were famous in the congregation, who strove against Moses and against Aaron in the company of Korah, when they strove against the LORD:

And what he did unto Dathan and Abiram, the sons of Eliab, the son of Reuben: how the earth opened her mouth, and swallowed them up, and their households, and their tents, and all the substance that was in their possession, in the midst of all Israel:
